g.onclick: sendPrompt('What actions can the user take in Kodez CheckMate?')
sendPrompt('What does Kodez CheckMate do as a SecOps orchestration platform?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI Agent orchestrate SecOps workflows?')
sendPrompt('What does the database store in Kodez CheckMate?')
sendPrompt('How does Auth0 Token Vault secure integration tokens?')
sendPrompt('What does Azure Foundry GPT provide to the AI Agent?')
sendPrompt('How does Auth0 CheckMate scan Auth0 tenant configurations?')
sendPrompt('What is the Auth0 Tenant in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI Agent create JIRA tickets from scan findings?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI Agent publish executive summaries to Confluence?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI Agent send vulnerability alerts to Microsoft Teams?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Workflow trigger Auth0 CheckMate scans?')
